title: 2Pcs 8532128020 Windscreen Washer Wiper Nozzle Check Valve, Replacement for Toyota 4Runner Camry Corolla Highlander Land Cruiser 3 Way Windscreen Washer Check Valve
features: Fitment: Replacement for Toyota 4Runner N280 (2010-2016), replacement for Avensis T270 (2009-2016), replacement for Camry XV40 (2007-2011), replacement for Corolla (2009-2016), replacement for Highlander MK2 MK3 (2008-2016)

Fitment: Replacement for Toyota Mirai (2014-2020), replacement for Prius C (2012-2016), replacement for Prius MK3 (2010-2015), replacement for Prius V (2012-2016), replacement for RAV4 XA30 (2006-2016)

Function: A non-return valve that fits at the end of the washer pipe inside the washer bottle prevents sludge from traveling up the narrow washer pipe tube and also prevents water from draining down to the jets
Package Included: 2 x Windscreen Washer Wiper Nozzle Check Valves. As shown in the pictures
description: Product Description Windscreen Washer Wiper Nozzle Package Includes: 2 x Windscreen Washer Wiper Nozzle Check Valves Prevents sludge buildup Ensures clear visibility Simple twist-lock installation Essential for effective windshield cleaning Enhance Your Visibility with Reliable Washer Nozzle Check Valves Essential Replacement for Your Vehicle Enhance your vehicle's windshield washer system with our Washer Wiper Nozzle Check Valves. Designed to prevent sludge buildup, these valves ensure clear visibility in all driving conditions. Their simple installation allows you to maintain optimal performance without hassle. Constructed from robust plastic, these check valves fit securely at the end of the washer pipe, preventing water from draining back to the jets. This feature keeps your washer system functioning smoothly, providing consistent spray for effective cleaning. Whether you're dealing with rain or road grime, these check valves are essential for maintaining a clear windshield. Invest in reliability and ensure your visibility is never compromised on the road. Compatibility Information Fitment Replacement for Toyota 4Runner N280 (2010 2011 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016) Replacement for Toyota Avensis T270 (2009 2010 2011 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016) Replacement for Toyota Camry XV40 (2007 2008 2009 2010 2011) Replacement for Toyota Corolla (2009 2010 2011 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016) Replacement for Toyota Highlander MK2 MK3 (2008 2009 2010 2011 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016) Replacement for Toyota Hilux AN120, AN130 (2015 2016 2017 2018 2019) Fitment Replacement for Toyota Land Cruiser (2008 2009 2010 2011 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016) Replacement for Toyota Land Cruiser Prado J150 (2009 2010 2011 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016) Replacement for Toyota Mirai (2014 2015 2016 2017 2018 2019 2020) Replacement for Toyota Prius C (2010 2011 2012 2013 2014 2015) Replacement for Toyota Prius MK3 (2010-2015) Replacement for Toyota Prius V (2012 2013 2014 2015 2016) Replacement for Toyota RAV4 XA30 (2006 2007 2008 2009 2010 2011 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016) Fitment Replacement for Toyota Scion iM (2014-2016) Replacement for Toyota Scion iQ (2012 2013 2014 2015) Replacement for Toyota Scion tC MK2 (2011-2016) Replacement for Toyota Sequoia (2008 2009 2010 2011 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016) Replacement for Toyota Tacoma (2015 2016) Replacement for Toyota Tundra MK2 (2007 2008 2009 2010 2011 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016) Replacement for Toyota Venza (2009 2010 2011 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016) Product Specifications Material: Plastic Color: Black Part Number: 8532128020 Compatibility: Replacement for Toyota models (not listed here) Installation Type: Twist-lock for secure attachment Installation Information and Usage Tips Easy Installation : Simply twist the check valve onto the washer pipe for a secure fit. No special tools are required. Regular Maintenance : Check for clogs or debris in the washer system periodically to ensure optimal performance. Temperature Considerations : Avoid exposing the check valves to extreme temperatures to prolong their lifespan. Compatibility Check : Ensure the valve fits your specific vehicle model for proper function. Visual Inspection : Regularly inspect the valves for any signs of wear or damage to maintain effective windshield cleaning.
